description_long: This is a small recreational motorboat with a streamlined, V-shaped hull and a predominantly white exterior accented by a red stripe along the side. The bow features a metal safety rail and an open deck area, while the cockpit is protected by a wraparound windshield. Two dark-colored seats are positioned behind the windshield, with a visible steering wheel and dashboard controls on the starboard side. The stern is enclosed and smooth, with no visible outboard motor or propeller, suggesting the propulsion system may be inboard or not modeled. The boat's design is compact and modern, suitable for leisure activities on calm waters. The overall finish is sleek, with hard surfaces and minimal external detailing.
description: A compact, modern white and red motorboat with a V-shaped hull, open bow, and two seats behind a wraparound windshield. Features a metal safety rail and a sleek, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, metal safety rail, open deck, and two seats behind the windshield.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red accent stripe, V-shaped hull, and the profile of the windshield and seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed stern, dashboard, steering wheel, and the backrests of the two seats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same hull shape, red accent, and cockpit layout as the other side.
